_meta.extractionMethod: static-analysis — Playwright MCP browser session unavailable in this environment (confirmed both 2026-06-06 10:30 and 2026-06-06 current run). Token values sourced from: (1) prior live browser run recorded in metronic-full-extraction.json; (2) Metronic Tailwind v4 published CSS (keenthemes.com CDN + GitHub tailwind/css/variables.css, tailwind/css/themes/default.css); (3) Metronic Tailwind v4 official component documentation; (4) computed sampleElements block from prior extraction. All HSL values converted to hex. This file supersedes metronic-full-extraction.json.
_meta.pagesVisitedNote: Pages listed reflect intended scrape targets per task brief. Confirmed via prior extraction run (STATUS_DATA 2026-06-06 10:30) that dashboard, auth sign-in, account, and user-cards are the four primary extraction surfaces for Demo1.
_meta.hslToHexNote: HSL conversion formula: hsl(H, S%, L%) -> hex. Values confirmed against Metronic Tailwind v4 source CSS. MeeSell primary color is #F26B23 (orange), NOT Metronic #3B82F6 (blue) — adapters must re-derive -light/-clarity/-active tints from MeeSell brand palette.

scale.note: Metronic uses 13px as base (not 16px). Scale derived from rendered h1-h6 and component inspection.

transitions.color: color 0.15s ease-in-out, background-color 0.15s ease-in-out, border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out

spacing.note: Metronic uses a 4px base grid. Tailwind default scale. Common component values: card-padding=30px (1.875rem), card-header-padding=20px 30px, btn-padding=8.8px 20px, input-padding=10px 16px

zIndex.note: Metronic v4 z-index follows Bootstrap 5 scale with KT overrides. Sidebar uses position:fixed with z-105 (Tailwind z-105 = 105). Header z-100. Modal/backdrop sequence: backdrop=1050, modal=1055. Toast/notifications=1080 (highest). Drawers/offcanvas=1045.

base.transition: color 0.15s ease-in-out, background-color 0.15s ease-in-out, border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out

input._selector: input[type=text], input[type=email], input[type=password], input[type=search], input[type=number], .form-control, select, textarea

table._selector: table, .table, thead, tbody, tr, td, th

link.transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease

componentInventory.name: Dashboard Stat Card
componentInventory.description: KPI metric card with icon, value, label, and trend indicator. Found in 4-column grid on dashboard.

componentInventory.name: Data Table
componentInventory.description: Sortable data table with thead, striped tbody, action column. Wrapped in card body.

componentInventory.name: Chart Card — Line/Area
componentInventory.description: Card containing ApexCharts area/line chart with legend and period selector buttons.

componentInventory.name: Chart Card — Bar
componentInventory.description: Card with horizontal or vertical bar chart (ApexCharts). Color-coded by category.

componentInventory.name: Chart Card — Donut/Pie
componentInventory.description: Card with donut chart (ApexCharts). Used for proportional data like traffic sources.

componentInventory.name: Recent Transactions List
componentInventory.description: Scrollable list of transaction rows with avatar, title, date, amount, and status badge.

componentInventory.name: Earnings Card
componentInventory.description: Feature card with colored gradient background, large metric, subtitle, and action button.

componentInventory.name: Quick Actions Toolbar
componentInventory.description: Sticky toolbar below header with page title, breadcrumb, and action buttons (CTA, secondary).

componentInventory.name: Primary Button
componentInventory.description: Solid blue button. Main CTA style.

componentInventory.name: Secondary/Light Button
componentInventory.description: Light background button for secondary actions.

componentInventory.name: Icon Button
componentInventory.description: Square icon-only button. Used in tables and toolbars for actions like edit, delete, view.

componentInventory.name: Status Badge
componentInventory.description: Semantic color badge for status labels. Variants: primary, success, warning, danger, info with light background option.

componentInventory.name: User Profile Card
componentInventory.description: Profile card with avatar, name, role, social stats, and connect button. Used in user directory grid.

componentInventory.name: Avatar / Symbol
componentInventory.description: Avatar component: image or initials. Circle and rounded-square variants. Multiple sizes. Stacking support. Online dot indicator.

componentInventory.name: Avatar Stack
componentInventory.description: Overlapping avatar stack (symbol-group). Shows count badge when overflow.

componentInventory.name: Progress Bar
componentInventory.description: Horizontal progress bar. Color variants match semantic color system. Multiple height sizes.

componentInventory.name: Navigation Tabs
componentInventory.description: Underline-style tabs. Used on profile/account pages for section switching. Pill tab variant also available.

componentInventory.name: Search Input
componentInventory.description: Expandable search bar in topbar. Has icon prefix. Expands on focus with dropdown results.

componentInventory.name: Text Input
componentInventory.description: Standard form input with label, helper text, error state, focus ring. Sizes: sm/base/lg.

componentInventory.name: Select / Dropdown Input
componentInventory.description: Native select element styled as form control. Custom dropdown (Select2/Choices.js) variant also used.

componentInventory.name: Checkbox / Radio
componentInventory.description: Custom-styled checkbox and radio. Primary color on checked state.

componentInventory.name: Toggle Switch
componentInventory.description: Pill-shaped toggle. Enabled: primary blue. Disabled: muted gray.

componentInventory.name: Dropdown Menu
componentInventory.description: Floating dropdown for actions/options. Items with icon + label. Dividers, section headers. z-index 1000.

componentInventory.name: Notification Bell
componentInventory.description: Icon button in navbar that opens a mega-dropdown with notification list, tabs (all/read/archived), and empty state.

componentInventory.name: Alert / Notice Banner
componentInventory.description: Semantic alert box with icon, title, body text, dismiss button. Left-border color accent variant.

componentInventory.name: Empty State
componentInventory.description: Centered illustration + heading + subtext + CTA button for zero-data states.

componentInventory.name: Sidebar / Aside Navigation
componentInventory.description: Left fixed sidebar with logo, nav sections, menu items, icons, active state, collapsible to 75px icon-only mode.

componentInventory.name: Top Navbar / Header
componentInventory.description: Fixed top bar: 70px height, search, quick actions, notifications bell, user menu.

hoverPatterns.button: background-color + border-color shift to -active variant, 150ms ease-in-out
hoverPatterns.menu-link: background-color to secondary/F1F5F9, color to primary, 150ms ease
hoverPatterns.card: optional box-shadow intensification via .card-hover class, 200ms ease
hoverPatterns.table-row: background-color to table-striped-bg on hover, 150ms ease
hoverPatterns.dropdown-item: background-color to secondary/F1F5F9, color to primary, 150ms ease
hoverPatterns.tab-link: color to body-color, underline-border to muted, 150ms ease

transitions.color-swap: color 0.15s ease-in-out, background-color 0.15s ease-in-out, border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out

spacingScale._note: Metronic uses a 4px base grid (same as Tailwind default). Values below are the observed spacing from computed styles on actual components.

observed.4px: gap between tight elements (badge dot, notification dot border, avatar border)
observed.6px: btn-sm padding v, badge pill padding v
observed.8px: dropdown-item padding v, tab separator margin, dropdown divider margin, pagination gap, btn-icon-sm size unit
observed.10px: input padding v, symbol stacked overlap, menu item margin-side (inside sidebar menu-link margin correction)
observed.12px: dropdown padding h (sm), pagination link width/height unit, modal footer gap, nav-link hover gap
observed.14px: td padding v, btn-sm padding h, breadcrumb separator margin
observed.16px: td/th padding h, alert padding v+h (base), toast padding, form-group margin-b, heading margin-b unit
observed.20px: btn padding h, card-header padding v, modal header/footer padding v, sidebar logo padding h, tab padding h
observed.24px: btn-lg padding h, stat-card stats gap, user-card stats gap
observed.30px: card body padding, modal body padding, sidebar logo padding (contextual), navbar padding h
observed.36px: nav-link square size, btn-icon size, search height
observed.48px: card-header min-height unit, sidebar submenu paddingLeft, spinner lg size
observed.50px: stat-card icon wrapper size, offcanvas header to body ratio, modal dialog margin v

darkMode._note: Dark mode toggled via data-bs-theme='dark' attribute on <html> or .dark class. These are the primary dark overrides — not exhaustive.

meesellAdaptationNotes._purpose: Guidance for meesell-angular-ui-styler when adapting Metronic tokens to MeeSell design system.

brandOverride.note: MeeSell primary is orange (#F26B23), not blue. ALL primary-light, primary-clarity, primary-active, primary-foreground must be re-derived from MeeSell orange. Do NOT copy Metronic blue token values directly for primary variants.

tokensToAdoptDirectly: All semantic colors (success, warning, danger, info) — these are brand-neutral
All radius tokens (card, modal, dropdown, btn, input, badge)
All shadow tokens (card, modal, dropdown, focus-ring)
Typography scale (Inter font, 13px base, weight scale)
Spacing grid (4px base, all observed values)
All animation keyframes and transition definitions
Body-bg (#F1F5F9), border (#E4E7EC), muted (#6B7280), heading (#0C0E1A) — all safe
newComponentsToAdd: Stat card (dashboard KPI card pattern) — not in current MeeSell component library
Avatar stack (symbol-group with overlap + count badge) — needed for catalog management views
Empty state component — needed for zero-catalog, zero-SKU states
Toast container (position: fixed, top-right, z-1080) — not wired in current Angular setup
Offcanvas/drawer — needed for mobile sidebar and filter panels
Breadcrumb — needed for deep navigation (dashboard > catalog > sku)
Progress bar with semantic color variants — needed for quality scorecard
Toggle switch — needed for settings/preferences page
